challenges.name: Behind the Scenes
challenges.keyTakeaway: Binary triage fundamentals — using file, strings, and ltrace to extract hidden information from ELF binaries without a disassembler

challenges.name: DVHO
challenges.keyTakeaway: Simple conditional check reversing — reading decompiled code to understand password validation logic and bypass it

challenges.name: Shattered Tablet
challenges.keyTakeaway: String comparison reversing — identifying hardcoded flag checks through static analysis of comparison functions

challenges.name: Simple Encryptor
challenges.keyTakeaway: Algorithm reversal methodology — reading XOR and bit rotation operations in decompiled C code and reversing them in the correct order with a Python solver script

challenges.name: Hunting
challenges.keyTakeaway: Windows PE reversing — analyzing a .exe in Ghidra, understanding PE structure, and tracing flag construction across functions

challenges.name: Impossible Password
challenges.keyTakeaway: Anti-debugging and string obfuscation — defeating runtime-generated strings by patching or using GDB to bypass checks

challenges.name: Bypass
challenges.keyTakeaway: Authentication bypass — patching conditional jumps to skip password checks and understanding how branch instructions control program flow

challenges.name: Exatlon
challenges.keyTakeaway: Binary packing concepts — detecting UPX-packed binaries through entropy and signature analysis, unpacking with upx -d, and reversing the underlying encryption scheme

challenges.name: Rebuilding
challenges.keyTakeaway: Algorithm reconstruction — translating assembly-level loops and arithmetic into a high-level algorithm to reproduce the flag

challenges.name: Ouija
challenges.keyTakeaway: Multi-function analysis — tracing data flow across multiple functions and understanding complex control flow in decompiled output

challenges.name: GhostInTheShelcode
challenges.keyTakeaway: Shellcode analysis — decoding and disassembling raw shellcode payloads to understand their behavior and extract embedded data

challenges.name: Tear Or Dear
challenges.keyTakeaway: .NET reversing fundamentals — understanding why managed code decompiles almost perfectly and using DNSpy/ILSpy to recover near-original source code from .NET assemblies

challenges.name: LootStash
challenges.keyTakeaway: Encryption algorithm reversing — identifying and reimplementing custom or standard cryptographic routines found in compiled code

challenges.name: DebugMe
challenges.keyTakeaway: Anti-debugging bypass techniques — identifying and defeating ptrace detection, timing checks, and self-modifying code (XOR unpacking) that protect a binary from analysis

challenges.name: Bombs Landed
challenges.keyTakeaway: Multi-phase binary bomb — solving sequential puzzle phases that test assembly reading, algorithmic thinking, and debugging precision

challenges.name: Snakecode
challenges.keyTakeaway: Python bytecode reversing — decompiling .pyc files, reading Python bytecode with the dis module, and reconstructing obfuscated logic
